title: Drodi's Villagers x Fresh Animations
description: Torn between Drodi’s Villagers and Fresh Animations? You’ve come to the right place!
body:
# Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) 

Torn between Drodi’s Villagers and [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)? You’ve come to the right place!

**Drodi’s Illagers x Fresh Animations** is a patch for **Fresh Animations** so you can have all the features from both packs.

For it to work properly, you need to download:

- Drodi’s Vllagers x Fresh Animations
- [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
  

In the resource pack list, place Fresh Animations below Drodi’s Villagers x Fresh Animations or it won’t work!

![load order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cdaafa1a049cb979c7526283f4496296dd38c67.png)

<details>
<summary>OFFICIAL SOURCES</summary>


The OFFICIAL versions of my packs are available here on Modrinth under the profile [@Drodi](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi) and on Planet Minecraft under the profile [Drodi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/drodi/). Any other source may contain viruses or malwares, so if you want to download from other sites, do so at your own risk.

If you believe someone else is reuploading my Ressource packs on other sources and action is possible, please contact me on discord (drodi99)

</details>

<details>
<summary>CREDITS</summary>


- [Reijvi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/reijvi/) and his [Reimagined](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/minecraft-reimagined-5096190/) pack for inspiring the overhaul style of the pack, aswell as letting me use many of his color palettes
- [Thanos](https://modrinth.com/user/thanos) who let me use his baby villager model from [pixel consistent](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-consistency)
- [Fresh LX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) for allowing me to upload this compatibility patch on modrinth.
